name: Pane Bianco
teaser: The pizza I eat the most in Los Angeles, by a wide margin. Best-traveling thin crust I've ever encountered.
review:
Bianco's other spot is the pizza I eat the most in Los Angeles by a wide margin. The NY-style pies (18" but not typical NY) are heartier and crispier thanks to a longer bake in the electric oven and some dough tweaks.

This is the best-traveling thin crust I've ever encountered — it's just as good, if not better, on reheats. And though they're only open 11 AM–4 PM, I can assure you that the slices keep well all weekend.
headsUp: Closes at 4 PM sharp. Do not sleep on it.
update: Still the most consistent slice shop in LA.
address: 5472 Los Feliz Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90027
